---
title: "Beyond Objective Parameters: Parametric Dual-Gap Regret for Predict-then-Optimize under Unknown Constraint Parameters"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
year: 2026
venue: "ICLR"
status: "under-review"
type: "first-author"
doi: ""
url: ""
keywords:
  - "predict-then-optimize"
  - "constraint uncertainty"
  - "regret"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Planned / In Revision (ICLR 2026 cycle)

This manuscript develops dual-gap regret objectives for constrained PtO with unknown constraint parameters.
